text_excerpt: Surgeries – Luke Myer MP for Middlesbrough South and East Cleveland Who I am What I do How I can help Surgeries News South Middlesbrough Guisborough East Cleveland 0 QUESTIONS 0 SURGERIES £ 0 k WON FOR RESIDENTS 0 CASES CLOSED I want to hear about the issues that are important to you. Book your slot! If you have an issue that needs resolving, or just want to meet me and say hello, get in touch! Myself and my team of caseworkers will do everything we can to help you. ← Back Thank you for your response. ✨ Name (required) Email address (required) Post code (required) Phone number Which surgery would you like to attend? (required) What would you like to discuss during your appointment? (required) Please note that my surgery appointments can fill up quickly. If there are no remaining appointments available on your desired date, new surgeries are being arranged every month, so please check regularly for new dates and locations.
